scripts.postinstall: npx appium driver install uiautomator2 || true && npx appium driver install xcuitest || true
scripts.report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:android:dev: npm run clean:report && TEST_ENV=dev npx wdio run ./config/wdio.android.conf.ts; npm run report
scripts.test:android:ft: npm run clean:report && TEST_ENV=ft npx wdio run ./config/wdio.android.conf.ts; npm run report
scripts.test:android:prp: npm run clean:report && TEST_ENV=prp npx wdio run ./config/wdio.android.conf.ts; npm run report
scripts.test:ios:dev: npm run clean:report && TEST_ENV=dev npx wdio run ./config/wdio.ios.conf.ts; npm run report
scripts.test:ios:ft: npm run clean:report && TEST_ENV=ft npx wdio run ./config/wdio.ios.conf.ts; npm run report
